SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-16-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-16-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC'S REPRESENTATIVE: MARICRUZ CEDANO. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
